case_title: GOOD, HARVEY et al vs. QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD, HARVEY GOOD, LUCILA AS TO DEFENDANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-23-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-03-1996

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $206.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-03-1996, CONTINUED TO DEC-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 11/18/96. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1996, CONTINUED TO SEP-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING AND PERFECTING DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
